title: Cyberabad Police Announce Traffic Diversions Near Gachibowli Stadium for Saturday Musical Event
description: Vehicles from Financial district, Gopanpally Thanda, Gowlidoddi, Q-City and Kokapet towards IIIT junction will be diverted at Wipro junction towards Nanakramguda Rotary, merging into ORR and Gachibowli junction: Reports
